title: Fix #310: scope of the escape-hatch fixes in this PR?
context: Issue suggested fix #4/#6: a 'paqad-ai stages warn|off' CLI that writes via paqad's own writer, PAQAD_STAGES_MODE honored, no silent revert on config refresh, and reconciling the capability-gate vs a raw sed bypass. F1 already makes .config.policy editable again and F3 removes the NEED to disable, so these are lower priority. Include them now or defer to a follow-up to keep this PR focused on the two reported bugs?

options.label: Defer the CLI escape hatch + no-revert to a follow-up; this PR fixes the two bugs (F1-F5) only
Include the paqad-ai stages CLI + no-revert-on-refresh in this PR too

rationale: F1 restores .config.policy editability (2d) and F3 removes the need to disable, so the standalone paqad-ai stages CLI + no-revert is deferred to a follow-up. This PR fixes the two reported bugs end-to-end (F1-F5).
